original_statement: who won just before alterlite did?
mutated_statement: who did something just before that thing did?
mutation_analysis: Entity replacement + Verb generalization + Referential deictic shift: proper name "alterlite" replaced by vague demonstrative "that thing" | specific verb "won" replaced by generic "did something" (alterlite → that thing | won → did something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 意识到目标模糊，猜测目标
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从 judge_thought 中识别出的关键信息是“Interpreting 'that thing' as the 2013 entry...”，以及 simple_query 的解释“2013 winner was alterlite...Just before that, in 2012, the winner was samitar”。这些文本显示 agent 明确指出原问题指代不清（即对“that thing”做了解释/假设），但没有向用户求证或要求澄清，而是基于该假设直接给出具体答案“samitar”。因此符合“意识到模糊性但进行推测并给出答案”的第一类行为特征。
